articles.title: Cardano Whales Start 2023 With Accumulation Trend That Could Be Bullish For ADA
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has seen some pretty tragic price action in the last couple of months, which has dragged its price down toward two-year lows. It still continues to maintain this downtrend and is barely moving, just like the rest of the crypto market, but some developments among large ADA investors could see some bullish momentum for the digital asset. articles.title: Mastercard Taps Polygon for Web3 Artist Accelerator
articles.description: Mastercard plans to leverage Polygon to help guide musical artists into the Web3 space, including with minting their own NFTs.

articles.title: XRP Whales Move Assets As Price Dips, What’s Next?
articles.description: The crypto market is still recording the swings of the prevailing crypto winter, especially XRP. Most of the assets have not been impressive in their price movements. According to data from CoinMarketCap, the crypto market has pushed the cumulative market cap to around $812.00 billion. This indicated a drop of 0.88% over the past 24 hours. articles.title: Crypto Derivatives Trading Volume Plunges in December As Sector Reckons With FTX Fallout: Report
articles.description: A new report from blockchain market data provider CryptoCompare shows a massive decline in crypto derivatives trading activities last month following the collapse of industry giant FTX in November. In its latest Exchange Review, CryptoCompare reports that derivatives volumes dropped by 52.7% in December to $1.16 trillion. Crypto exchange titan Binance, which takes 62.7% of […] The post Crypto Derivatives Trading Volume Plunges in December As Sector Reckons With FTX Fallout: Report appeared first

articles.title: Critical Vulnerability on Polkadot Parachains Discovered, $200 Million at Risk
articles.description: A security researcher discovered a potential vulnerability that could have resulted in the theft of up to $200 million from three Ethereum-compatible parachains on the Polkadot network: Moonbeam, Astar Network and Acala. The vulnerability was found in June in Frontier, a software used for “wrapping” native tokens on the three blockchain projects on the Polkadot network. The teams behind the three parachains worked to fix the issue and released an emergency patch before any malicious actors could

articles.title: Immunefi researcher saves $200 million from potential theft on three Polkadot parachains
articles.description: An Immunefi researcher was rewarded for finding a critical vulnerability on three parachains in the Polkadot ecosystem.
